review_text: Pet friendly .
Very dog friendly, very clean, well maintained, pristine solar heated pool with pleanty of stuff nearby.
this is a very small park , but so quite,  an awesome little caravan park.  nit far from every thing

Great park - family run business and they’re all wonderful people. Cabins are clean and have really nice touches that make them feel more like a holiday home. Walking distance from everything in town. Small team so sometimes need to ring the mobile as office unoccupied but they respond quickly.

Don't be fooled by this little tourist park. It looks small from the outside, but it's packed with the most amazing customer service. Tanya and the team were so helpful and made adjustments for us when we arrived and when we left. We stayed in a camper trailer so Im not sure about the rooms, but knowing how clean the bathrooms are, it wouldn't surprise me if it's amazing! During our stay Tanya was just a call away to ask questions  and advice as it was our first time in Lakes Entrance. The kids loved the bunnies and the closeness to the beach. Would 100% recommend and will stay here again!!
They need to put new mattresses on the bed in our cabin, it had wires sticking through. There were ants everywhere in the cabin.  The fridge was so noisy we had to turn it off.
10 years staying at this place!

We have stayed at Echo Beach many times a year for many years. We have found Leigh and Sheree to be extremely welcoming and friendly. We highly recommend staying here. Only a short walk  to beach and shops. Absolutely perfect holiday and always a home away from home. Keep up the great work 👍😀

One street back from the hustle and bustle is this great quiet park. Good clean amenities and the owners are lovely.
Cabins or van sites available.
Nice pool, kids petting cage and playground.
Walk to everything.
Good place to stay. The rooms are OK - we had the oldest one (booked late) but it was a good stay.
Very clean facilities and  the lady working on reception was so lovely and accommodating, especially when we turned up without a booking.

Friendly staff, super clean rooms. Clean pool area for the kids. Lots of cooking equipment available in the cabins even the little (but important) things. Eg. Garlic press, bottle opener and colander. Trampoline and basketballs for the kids. We would have loved to stay longer.
A great little park thats very family friendly including your fur babies. Friendly staff, good amenities and a great location

Just spent 4 nights here and won't be returning.
Office locked and manager unable to be contacted by either mobile or landline.
Gaps between front door and jam, wind whistling in.
Minimal kitchen equipment of extremely poor quality.
Fitted sheet too small for the mattress and revolting stains on the mattress.
Dust everywhere, the fan in shower almost blocked with dust.
Sorry, but with old and poor quality building, you can do better than this!
Kids love it, must visit place. Cabins were nice clean and all amenities in.
Nice little holiday park, with a pool and some activities to keep kids amused.

Terrible customer service. Rude business owner.
We arrived late and the key was broken into the lock after one click. And I didn’t know why someone would to lock screen door for a cabin.
Anyway, staff responded quickly at night, changed into another room, good.
However, one staff in the morning came to question how the key was broken. After I explained, he blamed me for the broken key as I put the key wrong way in the lock. There are two keys on the ring and I could see another key clearly bend already. If not because of the poor quality of the key, I don’t understand why a key could break for any reason. It was rude and he interrupted my family breakfast. Such an unpleasant experience.
People can be toxic! Ignore the haters, this place is great. Friendly staff and very reasonable price.
You get what you pay for! 😂
Great dog friendly tourist park.  Terrific staff

if i could rate this place a 0 it would be a 0
the cabin me and my family were in was very un clean, we only got one bin liner, one small roll of toilet paper and a VERY MINI hotel like sample of shampoo and body wash. which was supposed to “last 4 people” as they said when we were booking. clearly just a business to rip people off and take their money and abuse guests.

the rooms were a disaster, ants and bed bugs were spotted, the mattress was so thin that it would’ve been better sleeping out side on the gravel road with out a blanket. the wifi was not able to connect and still didn’t get any money back even for the bed bugs and horrid smell. the bedding was stained including the pillows and sheets and it smelt very bad. which i had to go woolworths and get spray just to get through the night as it was that bad.

the kitchen had very limited options with plates and cutlery which the forks and spoons were dirts and had a smell so did the plates. the water from the kitchen i recommend not drinking as when i did i got a very ill stomach and when the water in a cup was left out for a few hours it started getting murky which obviously was not a good sign.

Nabour hates kids within 5 min a complaint
Not guy go elsewhere
Managerment don’t care to much either

Echo Beach took us in after NSW spat us out!||While waiting for our car to be fixed, Cherie very kindly helped put us up in one of her lovely cabins. It was just what we needed to get us back on our feet after sleeping in our broken down car for the past 3 days.||The facilities were great. Clean cabins - well air-conditioned, roomy, and comfortable. And the site itself is a pleasure to have called home for 4 nights, even despite the power and phone signal getting knocked out across the entire town, the atmosphere in the park was still upbeat as ever.||No issue was ever too much to ask for, and the rest of her team, family & pets - honestly worth it just for the pets - made our stay a stress-free one, in an otherwise anxiety-ridden week!||Thanks again for all your generosity & support, from the Scottish squatters in Cabin 25 :)
Cabin 16 me and family have cancel booking at this place due to him leaving there not kids friendly or family

Cabin 16 been there 18yrs and hated family’s and noise we were not being to noise 3 kids we have
We were ganna stay at 17 cabin but not now and friend canceled as well
Beautiful little park, parallel to the main st. Clean and tidy, will definitely come back again

Very convenient location,
The owners are amazing make an effort to explain the local places to visit. Clean amenities.
Pet friendly which is lovely and hard to find these days
The cabin was very clean
Will definitely book again with my family
Thankyou Echo beach

"There are 2 sides to every story "  I am writing in relation to a review I read on Echo Beach Tourist Park by a Walter Mueller and his Very rude wife. It was cup weekend just gone. My husband and I were guests at the park along with a lot of other lovely families.
We were sitting on the verandah of the cabin when a large Motorhome,  car and trailer pulled up on the site infront of us. From the moment the woman got out of the car she started to whinge to her husband and did this continually over the days.
The "Campfire" they complained about was 'One' very safe Firepit on one night being shared by various guests, who were very quiet and there was absolutely No danger to anything.
The next morning when the male owner of the camp walked around the park he was bailed up by Walter's wife who immediately started to abuse him about the fire etc and very rudely chopping her hand down into her other hand while she was yelling at the owner. She would not listen at all, he remained extremely calm and in the end walked off. My husband and I were disgusted in her behaviour.
That evening the lady owner, approached Walter and his wife to try to  have a discussion with them about their concern over the firepit the previous night.  This rude woman immediately started to yell at the owner and again started chopping her hand onto the other hand, close up at the owner who remained calm. The rude woman then went just inside her van and swore at the owner.
At that point the lady owner informed Walter and the rude woman that they had to leave the park by 10 am the following morning and handed them refund money. Again she was rude but the owner calmly walked away.
We have stayed at Echo Beach a number of times over the past 15 yrs and it has always been clean, friendly and a wonderful place to stay.
Don't believe every review you read, as said
"There are 2 sides to every story "

Worst experience ever.
Facilities sub standard.
Toilets not cleaned in 3 days.
Management promised us no campfires and every night fires were lit. When complained they got very abusive and called us names and told us to leave. Do not waste your money on that place.

Me and Jan spent 3 nights in cabin 41,for our 23 anniversary, Jacky and Brian were our hosts and were great,even a bottle of wine for us to celebrate.the cabin was spotlessly clean and had everything we needed,even a fence around it to let our dog ellie have a run around,highly recommend echo beach caravan park ,very friendly,close to everything and nice and quite,thanx again Richard and Jan

Booked but did not stay, booking had been changed without notice to a smaller cabin, accusations were levelled at me personally which I took offence to. Asked to cancel, they referred us back to the third party booking agent and have subsequently refused their request of a refund. Very poor experience all around, left me upset and in tears and spoilt our break.

The was nobody manning the facility. The cabin was not clean!! All fabric surfaces were stained/dirty.
There was mouse poop in cutlery draw. There was only one bin liner for four days. Limited equipment in kitchen. Was really disappointed ☹️
The place was really nice and modern. At night it was nice and quiet. The owner is a really sweet person and helped with everything. Really recommend staying there.

Best place to stay in Lakes Entrance
Nicest owner you will ever meet
10/10 experience

Pulled up and greeted with the most beautiful smile from Sherie
Affordable, clean ,bright, cabbin , quiet environment.
My boys loved the rabbits, Guinea pigs and playground,
Fantastic location
Highly recommended
Thanks for having us

Looking for a dog friendly cabin in Lakes Entrance and found this place. Designated cabins have dogproof fencing around the cabin and porch, and dogs are permitted inside the cabin. ,The Park has abundant pets (guinea pigs, rabbits, dogs etc) owned by the family running the place. The owners could not have been more welcoming or helpful. Highly recommend if you're travelling with your furbaby.
Owners are so lovely and nothing is too much bother, very clean and tidy park with everything we need! Park and animals are definitely a highlight for our toddler.

Worst experience ever … never going to spoil my holidays again by booking this hotel.
Hopeless staff, bad service, very egoistic staff, don’t know how to deal with the guests.
Cars in the parking are not safe, got my car scratched.
👎👎👎👎👎👎👎
Car not safe Scratched my car and rude behaviour

The service here was terrible. It was my brother’s birthday and we were just wishing and singing and the  faculty took $200 out of our account without information and later gave excuses that we were disturbing others. They called us and literally talked to us in a rude way that if we didn’t check out before 10am sharp next day they will take out $400 from our account.
We were informed later that the glasses we used were not kept in wardrobe even though we washed those and kept them aside to dry. I really felt disappointed from such unnecessary and irrelevant behaviour.
Even our cars had scratches and there was a note on car saying to not park there. This is not acceptable at all to damage our belongings.

Worst experience ever
1) Deducted money for cleaning without even informing…very unprofessional!!!!!
2) very rude staff
3) Not safe for cars
4) There was barbecue for guests we were using it but they asked us to leave
5) Also warned us to leave before 10am and if we are late even a minute we will be charged
Racist staff
Rude behaviour, didn't support us with the stay
Bad experience, poor customer service
